name: Simple Daily Report via Bot
description: Collects information from Calendar and Notes, sends via Telegram Bot API

steps.goal: Open calendar to today's view. Use read_screen to scroll and collect all today's events. Use clipboard_set to save the calendar data.
Open notepad app. Use read_screen to collect all visible notes. Append notes to clipboard using clipboard_set.

Read clipboard content using clipboard_get. Then use shell command: 'curl -X POST https://api.telegram.org/bot[TOKEN]/sendMessage -d chat_id=[CHAT_ID] -d text=[CLIPBOARD]' to send the collected information. Make sure to properly escape the text.
